lines.speaker: Professor Manglethorp
lines.text: Fascinating, fascinating. It's remarkable what these young dwarves have managed to create. Oh, hello young [man/woman/one].

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello, what's a gnome like you doing in a place like this?

lines.speaker: Professor Manglethorp
lines.text: Ah, well I have been sent by King to talk with the dwarves here and find out more about their recent advances in technology.

lines.speaker: Professor Manglethorp
lines.text: The rideable carts are a very handy way to get to mining sites, and the Blast Furnace is a magnificent beast of a machine.

lines.speaker: Professor Manglethorp
lines.text: Just what I need. Dwarven cuisine is a bit ... solid for my tastes.

lines.speaker: Professor Manglethorp
lines.text: Here, take these Grand Seed pods. Very useful in emergencies!

lines.speaker: Professor Manglethorp
lines.text: Here have this, I traded for it with some of the dwarves.

lines.speaker: Professor Manglethorp
lines.text: You must have had to travel a long way to get this to me. Here's a little something extra as a tip.
